text: Today I randomly discovered Dubai has an absolutely massive solar farm???

I realized Portuguese have this weird love/hate obsession with Brazil

They listen Brazilian music, watch Brazilian shows, sometimes date Brazilians, often talk about Brazil

Meanwhile Brazilians don’t even think about Portugal in their daily life

I think
What's crazy when you read about Taiwan Semiconductors (TSMC) is you realize Nvidia are essentially dropshippers

Only 4 out of 70+ projects I ever did made money and grew

 >95% of everything I ever did failed

 My hit rate is only about ~5%

 So...ship more

Amazon ($19.99) is a showroom for Aliexpress

Aliexpress ($5.17) is a showroom for Taobao

Taobao ($2.48) is a showroom for Alibaba

Alibaba ($0.69) is a showroom for well whoever actually makes the thing!

Via 
@pandrewhk

Gonna pin this 

After 7 years working as a dev, I quit my job to pursue my dream: build software I love and make a living out of it.

I have:
– Ideas
– Backup plans
– No wife, no kid
– Saving for 2+ years
– And most of all: Faith in myself

Let's see if I can make it!

They say I make $45K/month just by pure luck and just by posting my MRR on Twitter 

I'll ignore them and have my 8 years of GitHub graph printed on my wall as a self-reminder
